contributor_notes: Capacity from 2022 planning permit application. PPA claim from operator sustainability report; independently unverified. Parent company ownership confirmed via SEC 10-K filing (example).

moratorium_notes: Amsterdam municipality imposed a moratorium on new data center development in 2019; lifted 2022 subject to sustainability and land-use conditions. This facility received approval under post-moratorium criteria.
community_resistance_notes: Local residents association filed objections citing water and energy load; case covered by Het Parool (illustrative reference).
contributor_notes: Coordinates are approximate city-centre point; exact campus location not publicly disclosed by operator. Ownership structure inferred from Dutch KvK extract (illustrative). Capacity estimated from planning document noise and heat load modelling — treat as indicative only.
